summary: Iteration 4 - Canonical Field Audit Testing Complete. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend login and navigation to Timeline, Quotes, Invoices, and Settings all working correctly with canonical field names.
critical_code_review_comments: Canonical field audit successfully completed - all legacy field aliases removed
Backend DocumentResponse model correctly uses 'type' and 'amount' (not document_type/total_amount)
Frontend AgentTimeline.js correctly maps step_id, title, order_index from API response
Frontend AgentQuotes.js and AgentInvoices.js correctly use document_id, document_number, amount fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Canonical field audit complete. Key validations: (1) GET /api/documents returns 'type' and 'amount' fields without legacy aliases (total_amount, document_type removed), (2) GET /api/projects/{id}/steps returns step_id, title, order_index (not stage_id, name, order), (3) Frontend Timeline shows 5 stages with titles displayed correctly, (4) Frontend Quotes shows 4 quotes with CHF amounts, (5) Frontend Invoices shows 2 invoices with CHF amounts. All pages load without errors.
frontend_tests: Login as Demo Agent (Marc Dubois) - PASSED
Dashboard loads with Recent Activity - PASSED
Timeline page shows 5 stage cards with canonical step_id - PASSED
Quotes page shows 4 quotes with canonical document_id and amount - PASSED
Invoices page shows 2 invoices with canonical document_id and amount - PASSED
